item.title: House Passes SAVE America Act
item.description: The House of Representatives passed the SAVE America Act by a 218-213 margin on Wednesday, a bill that would require proof of citizenship to register....

item.title: ANOTHER TRANS SHOOTER: Police Confirm Man Who Killed 6 at School Identified as Woman
item.description: The Royal Canadian Mounted Police have identified the 18-year-old man who shot and killed six people at a school in British Columbia, critically injur...
